texto: Because we are so focused on the real world, we keep forgetting how fantasy-driven the Left really is....As with orthodox Marxists, the left adamantly believes it is "Progressive", implying that its adherents know the inevitable and virtuous outcome of history. In the Soviet Union the Party truly believed every five years that Stalin's commands to fix agriculture were bound to work....Lenin and Stalin killed tens of millions of "rich peasants" without ever learning how to feed their country.
explicacao: Citação de James Lewis sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Because we are so focused on the real world, we keep forgetting how fantasy-driven the Left reall…” articula motivacao, fantasy, idealism em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e trabalho.
